case_title: ROBERT BIGAMBO MASOLELE VS. SOPHIA CHICAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASOLELE, ROBERT BIGAMBO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASOLELE, ROBERT BIGAMBO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHICAS, SOPHIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,750.00 FILED BY MASOLELE, ROBERT BIGAMBO AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, SOPHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
